title: Exact Finite Principal Component Checks

solver_reuse.target: finite PCA bad principal eigenvalue QF_LRA/Farkas regression seed
solver_reuse.pressure: Exact finite-sample replay computes the principal covariance eigenvalue as 2 while a malformed row claims 3/2, isolating a compact spectral equality conflict for the Farkas route.
solver_reuse.next_step: Promote additional PCA, SVD, covariance, or dimensionality-reduction rows only when they add distinct finite spectral, projection, perturbation, or numerical-honesty pressure; keep statistical consistency, PCA optimality, randomized algorithms, and floating-point implementations in theorem or numerical-honesty lanes.

graduation_criteria: Encode the fixed rational sample table, mean vector, centered rows, centered Gram matrix, covariance matrix, eigenpairs, projections, and residual energy as deterministic exact-rational replay obligations.
Route the false principal-eigenvalue row through a source-linked QF_LRA artifact and checked Farkas evidence after exact replay computes the conflicting value.
Expose the pack through the probability/statistics, matrix computation, optimization, and numerical-analysis learner and consumer query surfaces.

Keep PCA optimality, SVD theorem coverage, statistical estimator consistency, randomized algorithms, perturbation theory, and floating-point PCA implementations marked Lean or numerical-honesty horizon.
